task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'owner@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

# Customer CRUD endpoints
when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer:
  requires login
  validate customer:
    name is text, required
    company is text, required
  saved = save customer to Customers
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  customers = get all Customers
  send back customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  customer = look up Customer with this id
  send back customer

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  save changes to Customers
  send back 'updated' with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Customers with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200

# Filter customers by onboarding status
when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  customers = get all Customers where status is 'onboarding'
  send back customers

# OnboardingSteps CRUD endpoints
when user calls POST /api/customers/:customer_id/steps sending step:
  requires login
  validate step:
    step_name is text, required
  step's customer_id is this customer_id
  saved = save step to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers/:customer_id/steps:
  steps = get all OnboardingSteps where customer_id is this customer_id
  send back steps

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:id sending changes:
  requires login
  save changes to OnboardingSteps
  send back 'updated' with status 200

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:id:
  requires login
  remove from OnboardingSteps with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 200

# Frontend page
page 'Onboarding Tracker' at '/':
  requires login
  all_customers = []
  
  on page load:
    get all_customers from '/api/customers'
  
  section 'Add Customer':
    'Customer Name' as text input saved as new_name
    'Company' as text input saved as new_company
    button 'Add Customer':
      send {name: new_name, company: new_company} as a new record to '/api/customers'
      set new_name to ''
      set new_company to ''
      reload all_customers from '/api/customers'

  section 'Customers':
    display all_customers as table
